description_long: This object is a modern mobile phone with a sleek, rectangular form factor and rounded edges. The front surface is dominated by a large, glossy black screen, likely made of glass, with minimal bezels. The sides and back feature a metallic or high-gloss plastic frame with a deep red hue, adding a striking accent to the device. The bottom edge displays a series of small speaker holes and a central charging port, typical of contemporary smartphones. No physical buttons or camera modules are visible on the front or sides in these views, suggesting a minimalist design. The overall appearance is streamlined and premium, suitable for everyday urban use.
description: A sleek, modern mobile phone with a glossy black screen and deep red metallic frame, featuring minimal bezels and a streamlined design.
description_view_0: The phone is seen from the side, highlighting the deep red metallic frame and the thin profile of the device.
description_view_1: The bottom edge is visible, showing speaker holes and a central charging port, with the red frame accentuating the design.
description_view_2: The opposite side view mirrors the first, again emphasizing the slim, red-edged profile.
description_view_3: The top edge is shown, with a smooth, uninterrupted red frame and no visible ports or buttons.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen is blank or turned off, with no visible content, icons, or interface elements.
attribute_camera_placement: none visible; no camera modules or lenses are apparent on any side in the provided views.
attribute_button_layout: none visible; no physical buttons are apparent on any edge or surface in the provided views.
